name: Surprise Devil's Food Cake
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Fresh beets (peeled and finely shredded or grated)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 13x9x2-inch baking dish.
3. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, sugar, cocoa powder, baking powder, and baking soda.
4. Whisk in the buttermilk, melted butter, egg, and vanilla extract until well combined.
5. Stir in the shredded beets until evenly distributed.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared baking dish.
7. Bake for 45 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow to cool in the pan on a wire rack.
9. Cut into serving pieces.
Serves 12. Per serving: 282 calories, 6 grams protein, 45 grams carbohydrates, 10 grams fat, 75 milligrams cholesterol (with butter), 54 milligrams cholesterol (with margarine), 267 milligrams sodium. Exchanges: 2 starch/bread, 1 fruit, 2 fat. The surprise in this luscious cocoa cake is shredded beets. They enhance the deep reddish-brown color and add moisture. Good with or without Chocolate-Buttermilk Sauce. Store tightly covered at room temperature up to four days or freeze up to three months.
